channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran war day 41: What’s happening in Lebanon, Middle East and beyond?
item.description: Lebanon has declared a national day of mourning after Israeli attacks killed at least 254 people in a single day.

item.title: For Gulf states, Hormuz uncertainty casts shadow over US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: Experts say Gulf countries are wary of the US agreeing to a deal that gives Iran leverage over the vital energy route.

item.title: Trump slams NATO over Iran after meeting Rutte, renews Greenland threat
item.description: US president meets NATO chief, expresses disappointment over member states failing to back war on Iran.

item.title: Protesters outside Israeli embassy in London condemn assault on Lebanon
item.description: Protesters have blocked roads outside the Israeli embassy in London, condemning Israel’s violent strikes on Lebanon.

item.title: US VP JD Vance says Lebanon is not part of the US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: US Vice President JD Vance says Lebanon is not part of the US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump threatens action if Tehran fails to comply with deal
item.description: UN human rights chief Volker Turk describes Israel's attacks on Lebanon as 'horrific', coming so soon after ceasefire.

item.title: ‘Israel must be restrained for US-Iran ceasefire to hold’
item.description: Former US counterterrorism chief Joe Kent had warned Israel could ‘sabotage’ the US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: Americans question Trump’s instinct on Iran war
item.description: Americans are split on whether to trust Donald Trump's instinct-driven approach to the Iran conflict.

item.title: JD Vance says Iran would be ‘dumb’ to let talks collapse over Lebanon
item.description: The US vice president says Iran had a 'legitimate misunderstanding' about Lebanon's inclusion in this week's ceasefire.

item.title: Trump administration signals it is mulling NATO withdrawal after Iran war
item.description: The US president has lashed out at European partners for declining to contribute military forces to the war on Iran.
